Class LoginRequestDto

java.lang.Object
com.sait.workshop05.api.dto.LoginRequestDto
public class LoginRequestDto extends Object
Request body for Workshop 7 login at POST /api/v1/auth/login. Send username or email but not both. The API prefers username when both appear so this DTO keeps only one set.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    LoginRequestDto()
    Creates an empty login request payload.

  • Constructor Details

    • LoginRequestDto

      public LoginRequestDto()
      Creates an empty login request payload.

  • Method Details

    • fromLoginPrincipal

      public static LoginRequestDto fromLoginPrincipal(String principal, String password)
      Builds DTO from the login field. Uses email when input contains at sign else username.
      Parameters:
      principal - login text entered by user.
      password - raw password value for authentication.
      Returns:
      populated DTO with either username or email.

    • getUsername

      public String getUsername()
      Returns username login principal when login is username-based.
      Returns:
      username login value.

    • setUsername

      public void setUsername(String username)
      Sets username login principal.
      Parameters:
      username - username login value.

    • getEmail

      public String getEmail()
      Returns email login principal when login is email-based.
      Returns:
      email login value.

    • setEmail

      public void setEmail(String email)
      Sets email login principal.
      Parameters:
      email - email login value.

    • getPassword

      public String getPassword()
      Returns raw password value sent to the auth endpoint.
      Returns:
      raw password value.

    • setPassword

      public void setPassword(String password)
      Sets raw password value sent to the auth endpoint.
      Parameters:
      password - raw password value.

    • isRememberMe

      public boolean isRememberMe()
      Returns remember-me preference for login session handling.
      Returns:
      remember-me flag value.

    • setRememberMe

      public void setRememberMe(boolean rememberMe)
      Sets remember-me preference for login session handling.
      Parameters:
      rememberMe - remember-me flag value.
